should_trigger.text: PR 88 and the following split PRs keep failing CI after retargeting; map the stale bases and artifact ownership before more fixes.
This stacked PR series removed output artifacts but an earlier PR still needs local_validation_artifacts in clean checkout.
The superseded branch has repeated ledger edits and red CI; rebuild it from master with only in-scope commits.
GitHub Actions did not start after a ref update in this PR stack; diagnose token, event, filter, approval, and branch state before deciding workflow_dispatch or an authorized real push.
Before normal merge, check whether this split PR depends on a later cleanup PR for CI.

should_not_trigger.text: Write a better PR body for one green PR.
Do a read-only code review and find bugs in this PR.
Fix this one unit test failure in the current branch.
Show status for PR 92 checks only.
Normal merge this already green PR after review.
A single PR has an output schema CI failure; fix the schema test without rebuilding a PR stack.

near_neighbor.text: Prepare closeout notes and residual risk for a normal XIC PR.
Review a large diagnostics PR for public contract risk.
Run the PR CI-equivalent gate on the current clean branch.
